docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY OZTURK, AHMET AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHIU MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHIU MING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM KRAMER-SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF AHMET OZTURK IS PRESENT INITIALL ASSISTED BY TURKISH INTERPRTER JAMES DIRGIN VIA ZOOM REGISTER #700771 OATH ON FILE REGISTER QUALIFIED; THEN PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY KEMAL ERKOL #700561 OATH ON FILE REGISTER QUALIFIED. DEFENDANT CHIU MING LEE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY WINNIE CHAN PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY BY 4 DAY. THE DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OZTURK, AHMET LEE, CHIU MING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OZTURK, AHMET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, CHIU MING PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF RE DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
